rationale: Translated the one-line prompt into a v1 assumption ledger: 13 assumptions, 3 inflection points, 11 out-of-scope items. Defaulted to macOS as Apple Music desktop host (IP1), text-only display without album art (IP2), and display-only interactivity (IP3). Kept scope to a single Touchbar-mode action that spans the full bar and shows song + artist, polled from the local Apple Music app.

Split the build into 6 sections (S1 plugin-bundle-skeleton, S2 touchbar-layout-and-property-inspector, S3 sdk-handshake-and-event-loop, S4 polling-orchestrator-and-paint, S5 music-source-applescript, S6 edge-case-testing) and wrote 6 inter-section contracts. Accepted Discovery's defaults for IP1 (macOS), IP2 (text-only), IP3 (display-only). Introduced 6 TD-IPs all resolved by quick reasoning: Stream Deck SDK v2 manifest, Controllers:['Encoder']+custom layout+setFeedback for the touchbar surface, Node.js with vendored ws, AppleScript via osascript with tab-delimited fields, 2000ms default poll, SDK-native truncation (no marquee). Chose 'display' as the prompt-named verb. PNV scenario runs the integrated bundle against a mock SDK WebSocket with a stubbed osascript returning 'Bohemian Rhapsody\tQueen' and asserts a setFeedback frame carries both strings — the strongest production-fidelity check possible without the physical StreamDock device, per the briefing's verification constraint.
6 sections + integrator pseudo-node; 5 waves; inline dispatch mode.

manifest.json + 6 placeholder PNG icons produced. SDK-v2 manifest with mac-only OS, single Encoder action. dev-001 logged: chose contract value 'ui/inspector.html' for PI path over briefing's 'property_inspector/'.
music_source.js with AppleScript containing all 4 required literals. dev-002 logged: added MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var shim for harness; contract C-S4-S5 surface unchanged.
layouts/nowplaying.json with title+artist text items + ellipsis truncation. ui/inspector.html with 3 controls (pollIntervalMs, placeholder, showArtist) emitting setSettings on change.
sdk.js parses CLI args, handshakes with ws://127.0.0.1:port, dispatches events. run.sh entrypoint produced. ws 8.20.1 vendored under node_modules/.
main.js: per-context polling map, DEFAULT_POLL_MS=2000, settings-change restart, no marquee/scrollOffset. Live subprocess test against integrated trio passed all 5 AA.S4.*.
Copied all builder outputs into bundle structure. chmod +x plugin/run.sh. All 7 manifest-referenced paths resolve.

Real production-fidelity harness spawned ./plugin/run.sh against a fake SDK on a free port for each scenario; AppleScript shimmed via MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var only. 28/28 assertions passed including PNV.1 (Bohemian Rhapsody / Queen captured on the WS as a setFeedback frame).

Impact-analysis mode dispatch for escalation batch [esc-001, esc-002, esc-003] — three prose_coverage Sev 2b/3 gaps from Critic's final sweep. Chose Researcher's recommended opt-A: extend `covers` field on existing assertions from single-string to string-or-array, adding pointers to every uncovered coverage-required field. No new assertions, no contract amendments, no section CODE touched, no Builder re-dispatch. Integrated bundle and 28/28 harness pass remain bit-identical. ~50 `covers` extensions across MCA.TDIPA.*, MCA.TDIPD.*, DCA.A5/A11/A12/A13.*, DCA.OOS.TELEMETRY.1, PNV.1, AA.S1.*-AA.S6.*. Resolved gaps: 6 section charters (esc-001), 6 contract interfaces + 6 contract notes (esc-002), 4 assumptions A1/A3/A4/A9 + 7 ledger-OOS items + 19 section-OOS items + chosen_verb (esc-003). Authorized dual role per dispatch: produced both impact-analysis-v2.json and sections-v2.json in the same dispatch since the resolution is pure assertion-metadata.

Amendment-mode diff against ledger-v1 triggered by user-environment evidence: user installed delivered plugin at C:\Program Files (x86)\VSD Craft\plugins on Windows, side panel empty. User explicitly chose Windows-only rebuild. Amended A3 (data source mechanism: SMTC via PowerShell, not osascript), A4 (host OS: Windows, confidence high), A6 (rationale clarified — polling acceptable but SMTC is event-capable), A10 (bundle install path C:\Program Files (x86)\VSD Craft\plugins, .cmd/.bat entry not .sh), and resolved IP1 to Windows-only with resolution_source=user_explicit_choice. 4-question meta-check: (a) no, (b) yes, (c) no, (d) yes → goal-affecting; route to TD impact analysis. Added OOS items: macOS host, cross-platform single-bundle. A1/A2/A5/A7/A8/A9/A11/A12/A13 and IP2/IP3 inherited unchanged. User-resurfacing not required (user pre-committed to direction).

Impact-analysis mode dispatch for ledger-diff-v2 (IP1 → Windows-only). Two Researcher probes both recommended opt-A: probe-windows-nowplaying picked inline PowerShell + WinRT SMTC via child_process.execFile; probe-windows-plugin-runtime picked Nodejs.Version manifest declaration + CodePathWin → plugin/main.js direct (no .bat wrapper, no vendored node.exe). Classified S1 salvageable (manifest OS array flip mac→windows, +Nodejs:{Version:'20'}, +CodePathWin, drop CodePathMac, remove plugin/run.sh, Description updated, AA.S1.5 expected_value flipped, new AA.S1.6 added, new MCA.TDIPA.4 added), S2/S3/S4 unaffected (mechanism-agnostic by design), S5 stop_and_scrap_and_replace (renamed music-source-applescript→music-source-smtc; section.id preserved for DAG stability; module body and MCA.TDIPD.1/2 + AA.S5.1-4 literals rewritten to PowerShell + WinRT SMTC; MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var shim preserved per dev-002), S6 salvageable (fixture key rename osascript→powershell.exe; AA.S6.3 prose updated). Added TD-IP-G (Windows now-playing mechanism, resolved via research); marked TD-IP-D superseded; amended TD-IP-A. C-S4-S5 contract surface preserved verbatim (mechanism-agnostic at integration boundary — confirmed good upstream design by Researcher findings); C-S1-S3 gets implementation-rationale note (CodePathMac/run.sh inactive; node_runtime_assumption shifts to host's bundled Node via Nodejs.Version=20) but its load-bearing inter-section constraints unchanged; other contracts unaffected. PNV verb 'display' unchanged; PNV scenario fixture key renamed to powershell.exe. Totals: 8 assertions amended, 1 new (MCA.TDIPA.4 + AA.S1.6), 0 removed, 0 contracts amended (1 with implementation note). Authorized dual-role consolidation per dispatch given small well-bounded scope.

v3-windows-rebuild S1 salvageable amendment: OS->windows, +Nodejs.Version='20', +CodePathWin='plugin/main.js', -CodePathMac, Description updated to mention Windows + Apple Music (Microsoft Store). dev-003 logged (Nodejs object includes only Version, not GenerateProfilerData).

v3-windows-rebuild S5 stop_and_scrap_and_replace: AppleScript+osascript -> PowerShell+WinRT SMTC. Section renamed music-source-applescript -> music-source-smtc (id 'S5' preserved). C-S4-S5 surface + dev-002 MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim preserved verbatim. All 4 required SMTC literals present (GlobalSystemMediaTransportControlsSessionManager, Windows.Media.Control, TryGetMediaPropertiesAsync, PlaybackStatus). dev-004 logged (array-of-strings PS escape pattern).

v3 integration: replaced manifest.json (S1-v3) and plugin/music_source.js (S5-v3). plugin/run.sh reduced to inert vestige (delete unavailable in cowork sandbox; dev-005). integration/manifest.json updated to reflect v3 file list with run.sh removed and no glue chmod step. S2/S3/S4 outputs preserved byte-for-byte.

v3 harness ran end-to-end against integrated bundle (Node-direct spawn of plugin/main.js per CodePathWin+Nodejs.Version model). 33/33 assertions passed including PNV.1 (Bohemian Rhapsody / Queen captured as setFeedback frame to PNV-CTX). Sandbox caveat: powershell.exe absent in linux harness; MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE shim bypasses it; PS-to-SMTC boundary asserted structurally via AA.S5.4 literal-presence.

v3-windows-rebuild cycle complete. 6/6 sections verified under inline dispatch. Deliverable at output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/. Ready for critic_final_sweep and final delivery.
